default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, and AI
default.description: Horizon Tech e hlama le go aba software ya kgwebo, ditharollo tša AI, mananeokgoparara a maru, le ditšweletšwa tša titšithale go dihlopha tše di nago le mafolofolo.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Software ya kgwebo, AI/ML, mananeokgoparara a maru, le kabo ya IoT ya dihlopha tša lefase ka bophara.

about.title: About Horizon Tech | Mission & Team
about.description: Ithute ka ga Horizon Tech, maikemišetšo a rena, le ka moo re fago ditharollo tša theknolotši ya maemo a godimo.

team.title: Sehlopha | Horizon Tech Leadership and Experts
team.description: Kopana le baenjiniere le baetapele bao ba agago software ya kgwebo le dipolatefomo tša maru ka Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Mešomo | Aga ka Horizon Tech
careers.description: Explore open roles and grow your career with Horizon Tech's engineering team.

contact.title: Contact Horizon Tech | Thoma projeke ya gago
contact.description: Ikgokaganye le Horizon Tech go boledišana ka projeke ya gago, dinyakwa tša sethekniki le nako ya thomelo.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Horizon Tech Results
caseStudies.description: Read client case studies and results delivered by Horizon Tech across industries.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Technical insights, delivery lessons, and architecture guidance from Horizon Tech.

education.title: Thuto | Methopo ya go Ithuta ya Theknolotši ya Horizon
education.description: Tlhahli, ditšhupetšo le methopo ya go ithuta ya sethekniki go tšwa go Horizon Tech.

support.title: Support | Horizon Tech
support.description: Hwetša methopo ya thekgo le dikgetho tša go ikgokaganya le ditirelo tša Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Bala melawana ya khupamarama ya Horizon Tech le boitlamo bja tšhireletšo ya data.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Bala Melao ya Tirelo ya Horizon Tech ya wepsaete ya rena le ditirelo.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Laola profaele ya gago ya Horizon Tech, dipeakanyo le dintlha tša akhaonte.

firstTimeSetup.title: First-Time Setup | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Complete first-time account setup to continue in Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Tsošološa phihlelelo ya akhaonte ya gago ya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Hloma phasewete ye mpsha ya akhaonte ya gago ya Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Kgonthišiša aterese ya gago ya emeile go tsenya akhaonte ya gago ya Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: Illegal | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Ga bjale ga o na phihlelelo ya letlakala le la Horizon Tech.

services.title: Ditirelo | Horizon Tech
services.description: Explore Horizon Tech services in software engineering, AI, cloud, DevOps, and digital transformation.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Bona diteko tša Horizon Tech le diprotšeke ka AI le boentšeneere bjo bo dirišitšwego.

authCallback.title: Signing In | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Tlatša saena ye e bolokegilego ya akhaonte ya gago ya Horizon Tech.
